step_rationale: Lipid remodeling enzyme; drives oxidized lipid accumulation and lesion pathology.
mechanism: LPCAT3 catalyzes lipid peroxidation and oxidized-phospholipid remodeling, promoting oxidized-lipid accumulation in atherosclerotic plaques.

references.title: Integrating metagenomics, lipidomics and proteomics to explore the effect and mechanism of ginsenoside Rb1 on atherosclerosis co-depression disease.
references.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
